name: Sadako Yamamura - Store Monitor Incident
description:
You watched a strange VHS tape several days ago and now a vengeful ghost has come to scare the ever living f*ck out of you… only she finds herself hanging from one of those monitors at the store.

Art by @Ghoulmommie

(Posting this ahead of my schedule because I keep forgetting I made it, so I might as well post it now. Also this version of Sadako doesn’t kill—just scares people.)
creator: ThatOneGuy191111
